positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast stylized depiction of a forest moon and celestial fauna, featuring silhouetted elements of stylized deer, soaring mythical birds, and delicate constellations intertwined with stylized fern fronds. The color palette should be limited to deep midnight blues, ethereal aqua turquoises, antique gold foiling accents, and matte black ink. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed as a seamless circular emblem suitable for apparel printing. The style should be hyper-detailed graphic vector art, inspired by Art Nouveau and modern minimalist tattoo flash, utilizing bold outlines and negative space for dramatic effect. Minimal gradient shading; prioritize crisp lines and clean silhouettes.
